commands_run: for f in web/messages/*.json; do jq empty "$f" || exit 1; done
curl local homepage HTML for leaked i18n keys, stock image URLs, and restored homepage section markers
playwright-cli open http://127.0.0.1:3114/ and full-page screenshot sanity check
cd web && npm test -- tests/homepage-presence-lineage.test.ts tests/homepage-readability.test.ts
failure_reason: The public homepage had two coupled regressions: the English message bundle was accidentally truncated to a homepage-only object, leaking common/header/nav/homeBreath i18n keys, and the homepage body had collapsed into a presence-only surface with stock/TODO hero images. This task restores the full homepage story, keeps the presence lineage as a lower supporting section, replaces stock placeholders with local source-grounded public assets, and adds a static guard for bundle shape, supported locale keys, existing presence assets, and absence of stock/TODO URLs. The first focused test pass found missing fresh-worktree dependencies; npm ci resolved it. Browser console showed local dev proxy 500s for optional API calls, while the page rendered and production build passed.
